---
title: "Perception of Students on Antibiotic Resistance and Prevention: An Online, Community‑Based Case Study from Dhaka, Bangladesh"
type: "conference"
author: "Akter, S.,Hossain, M. J., Towhid, S. T., Sammo, M. A. S."
year: "2023"
publication: "36th BSM Annual Conference, Bangladesh Society of Microbiologists"
preprint: ""
doi: ""
materials: "publications/conference/AkterS_BSM2023.pdf"
toc: false
categories:
  - Conference
---

## Abstract
